Home Events Israel Lebanon Strikes April 2026

Israel Lebanon Strikes April 2026

Escalating
Middle East conflicthealth security

Timeline

2026-04-13

Netanyahu visits southern Lebanon, declares Hezbollah invasion threat eliminated

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned), BBC (Western)

2026-04-13

Direct US-Israel-Lebanon talks scheduled April 14 in Washington

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned), BBC (Western)

2026-04-13

Israeli army on high alert ahead of potential resumption of confrontation with Iran

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Israeli strike killed infant in Lebanon during father's funeral

Sources: AP News (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East), Jerusalem Post (Israel-aligned)

2026-04-13

Pope Leo XIV slams "delusion of omnipotence" stoking US-Israel war on Iran

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-13

Ben-Gvir visits Al-Aqsa Mosque compound with protection

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Global Sumud Flotilla departs Barcelona for Gaza — thousands gathering for largest-ever aid flotilla to break Israeli blockade

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-13

Israel-Lebanon: 6,500+ wounded; IDF strikes continue across southern Lebanon. Rescuers dig through rubble after strikes killed 13+. Red Cross paramedic killed in Israeli drone strike.

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

New Mossad chief approved: Roman Gofman confirmed as Mossad director; IDF Major General with record ordering strikes on Iranian officials.

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

IDF Merkava tank rammed UNIFIL vehicles

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Lebanon protests planned for April 14 with Israel

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Erdogan threatens military action against Israel; MK responded calling him "megalomaniacal dictator"

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut suburbs — IDF issued evacuation warnings for residents

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Hamas did not reject Witkoff's latest proposal on Gaza, leader says: "We did not reject the proposal but made some amendments"

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Almost one in three Gaza residents displaced since end of ceasefire — UN; Israeli army has issued 35 displacement orders since operations resumed

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Over 90% of families in Gaza have no money to buy food — UN OCHA: "supplies continue to dwindle, as what is allowed into Gaza is merely a trickle"

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Lebanese forces dismantle more than 500 military installations in country's south — PM: "will not be able to achieve stability if Israel continues its aggression against it"

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Israeli PM confirms enlisting Palestinian clans in Gaza to fight against Hamas

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Iran MFA spokesman Esmail Baghaei: US blocking Gaza resolution signifies "Washington's moral decay" and complicity in massacres including killing of children

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Palestinian parliament speaker Rawhi Fattouh: US becoming "direct accomplice" in Gaza crimes, bears political and moral responsibility for humanitarian catastrophe

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Israeli forces killed three Palestinians in Gaza; arrest operations continued in West Bank; Palestinian groups met mediators in Cairo for ceasefire discussions

Sources: Al Jazeera (Global South)

2026-04-13

South Korea President Lee Jae Myung compared IDF actions in Gaza to the Holocaust in social media post, drawing condemnation from Israel

Sources: SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-13

Israel-Lebanon death toll exceeds 2,089 since March 2; Hezbollah drone injures 8 IDF soldiers; US-Lebanon-Israel talks scheduled

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), Jerusalem Post (Israel), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-13

IDF intel official claims 250 Hezbollah fighters killed in April 8 strikes

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

UNIFIL reports Israeli tank ramming peacekeepers' vehicles twice

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Turkey's FM says Israel could act against Syria after Iran war

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Senior Hezbollah official does not rule out civil war in Lebanon

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Israeli strikes kill 18+ across Lebanon; 13 Lebanese state security personnel among dead

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Hezbollah fires on Israeli positions; warns Lebanese-Israeli talks "exacerbate domestic divisions"

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Lebanese-Israeli talks scheduled April 14 in Washington at ambassador level; US guarantees Beirut's safety until then

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-12

TASS: US, Lebanon asked Israel to pause attacks until talks begin — some Israeli officials agree

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Israel approves 34 new illegal settlements in West Bank; Palestinians "terrified they will lose land"

Source: The Hindu (India)

2026-04-12

Gaza civil defence: Israeli strikes kill seven despite October 10 ceasefire; both sides accuse each other of breaches

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Israel reprimanded Spanish diplomat over Spain's detonation of a Netanyahu effigy

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-12

Over 2,000 killed in Israeli attacks since March 2

Source: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-12

Israel struck Syrian south after projectiles crossed from Syrian territory into Israeli territory; Syrian authorities denied shelling, called incident staged by "forces seeking to destabilize the region"

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Turkey seeking ~5,000 years imprisonment for Netanyahu over October Gaza flotilla

Source: Jerusalem Post (Israel)

2026-04-12

UN Security Council to vote on draft resolution demanding ceasefire in Gaza

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Mediators aim to reach Gaza truce before Eid al-Adha

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Lebanon says first direct contact with Israel held ahead of US-brokered talks

Source: The Hindu (India)

2026-04-12

South Korea President Lee Jae Myung accused Israel of failing to reflect on alleged rights abuses, pushing back on Israeli fury over viral video showing soldiers allegedly pushing Palestinian child off a roof

Source: SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-12

Netanyahu declared the Iran campaign "not over yet" and claimed major achievements against Syria, Houthis, Hezbollah, and Hamas

Sources: India (India), Western Wire (Western)

2026-04-12

Israel approves 34 new West Bank settlements; Palestinians condemned the expansion as Israel legislates to formalize control over occupied territory

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-12

Lebanon and Israel officials set to meet in Washington on Tuesday (April 14); Hezbollah condemned the planned negotiations as exacerbating "internal divisions"

Sources: India (India), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-12

Hezbollah slammed planned talks: "exacerbates domestic divisions at a time when Lebanon most needs solidarity"

Sources: India (India)

2026-04-12

Ben-Gvir visits Al-Aqsa Mosque compound with protection; Israeli strike kills infant in south Lebanon during her father's funeral

Sources: AP News (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East), Jerusalem Post (Israel-aligned)

2026-04-12

Erdogan threatens military action against Israel; Israeli MK calls him "megalomaniacal dictator"

Sources: Jerusalem Post (Israel), Middle East Eye (Middle East)

2026-04-12

Global Sumud Flotilla departs Barcelona for Gaza — thousands gathering for largest-ever aid flotilla to break Israeli blockade

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-11

Israeli strike on Nabatieh government building death toll updated to 13 Lebanese state security personnel

Sources: Reuters (Western)

2026-04-11

Hezbollah rocket damages 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya, northern Israel

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), MEE (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Israeli strike kills nephew of Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Several airlines to reinstate flights to Israel in coming weeks

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Netanyahu requests delay in his corruption trial testimony

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Israel approves 34 new West Bank settlements — EU "strongly condemns"; OIC condemns; Palestinian presidency calls it "flagrant violation of international law"

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), BBC (Western)

2026-04-11

Lebanese death toll from Israeli attacks since March 2 rises to 1,953 with 6,303 wounded

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Lebanon confirms first direct contact with Israel held ahead of US-brokered talks (The Hindu, new)

Sources: The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Tuesday meeting at State Department confirmed; Israel agreed to negotiate with Lebanon but NOT with Hezbollah

Sources: The Hindu (India), BBC (Western), JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Israel excludes France from talks, calling it "biased mediator"

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Israel expels Spain from US coordination centre over "anti-Israel bias"

Sources: JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

**Narrative divergence**: Western sources note diplomatic progress on Lebanon track; regional sources emphasise continued Israeli offensive; JPost frames talks as limited, "low expectations"

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), JPost (Western/Israel)

2026-04-11

Israel says ceasefire with Hezbollah "not on the table" — explicit rejection ahead of Tuesday Washington talks

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), France24 (Western), Middle East Eye (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Hezbollah MP calls Lebanon-Israel talks "blatant violation" of Lebanon's constitution

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), France24 (Western), Middle East Eye (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Israel limits attacks on Lebanon at Washington's request (WSJ via TASS)

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

IDF claims 1,400 Hezbollah members eliminated in Lebanon over past month

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

7 Palestinians killed in Israeli attacks on Gaza

Source: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Muslims hold first Friday prayers at Al-Aqsa after 40-day Israeli closure

Source: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-11

**Narrative divergence**: Israel publicly rejects ceasefire while privately limiting strikes at US request; Hezbollah rejects the talks entirely as unconstitutional

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Israel rejected ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of scheduled Lebanon-Israel talks on April 14

Sources: BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East), Middle East Eye (Middle East)

2026-04-11

Over 200 sites struck in Lebanon over 24 hours; Hezbollah slams planned Lebanon-Israel talks as "exacerbating divisions"

Sources: TASS, BBC (Western)

2026-04-11

Funeral ceremonies held for those killed in Israeli strikes

Source: TASS

2026-04-11

US has guaranteed Beirut's safety until April 14 bilateral talks

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

IDF issues evacuation warnings for southern Lebanon positions

Source: middle_east-1930

2026-04-11

Multiple Hezbollah anti-tank and rocket launches confirmed

Source: middle_east-1930

2026-04-11

Hezbollah responded with rocket and drone barrages on northern Israel; IDF helicopter flares reported

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

Pressure-and-negotiate approach: intensive IDF strikes combined with scheduled Washington talks

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

US safety guarantee to Beirut constrains Israel's military options through April 14

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed 10 security personnel

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

Mourners bid farewell to Lebanese state security personnel killed in separate strike

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern)

2026-04-11

Hezbollah slammed planned Lebanese government talks with Israel as "exacerbating domestic divisions"

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern)

2026-04-11

Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon killed at least 18 people; death toll in Tafahta rises to 13

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern, Western)

2026-04-11

Hezbollah fired on Israeli military positions in southern Lebanon

Sources: Multiple feeds (Middle Eastern)

2026-04-11

UNICEF says humanitarian situation in southern Lebanon "critical"

Source: UNICEF via Multiple feeds

2026-04-10

Suspected drone intercepted over Erbil in northern Iraq; video shows explosion in sky above city. Iraq's northern region hosts Kurdish forces and US personnel, expanding conflict geography.

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-10

Hezbollah drones attack military facility in northern Israel (area of settlement Ya'ara) — first Hezbollah attack inside Israeli territory since ceasefire framework announced.

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned) via Tasnim

2026-04-10

Air raid alerts ring out across Tel Aviv and Ashdod; rocket fire resumes from Lebanon.

Sources: The Hindu (India)

2026-04-10

Israel continues heavy strikes on Lebanon despite authorizing direct talks; 182+ killed. IDF Chief Zamir: "Hezbollah is the main front." IDF dropped 18,000 bombs during the Iran war in 1,000 waves of IAF aircraft.

Sources: BBC/Reuters (Western), Times of Israel (Israel), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-10

Netanyahu: "There is no ceasefire in Lebanon."

Source: Times of Israel (Israel)

2026-04-10

203+ killed in IDF strikes on residential areas in Lebanon; Israel excludes France from upcoming US-hosted negotiations with Lebanon per sources cited to Jerusalem Post.

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), Reuters (Western), BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-10

Israel frames Hezbollah as ongoing threat; regional sources highlight civilian casualties.

Sources vary by perspective

2026-04-10

Kuwaiti army says Iran attacked National Guard facilities with drones, injuring personnel — first direct attack on a Gulf state. Israel excluded France from upcoming negotiations per Jerusalem Post. France24 footage showed Beirut hospitals overwhelmed.

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), Middle East Eye (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned), Reuters (Western)

2026-04-10

Strikes continue; Kuwait blames Iran for drone attack on National Guard facilities

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), Middle East Eye (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned), Reuters (Western)

2026-04-10

Israeli strike killed 13 members of Lebanon state security — significant escalation against official government forces

Sources: Middle East Eye, Al Jazeera, Reuters

2026-04-10

Death toll from Wednesday's Israeli strikes on Lebanon rises to 357

Sources: Al Jazeera

2026-04-10

Hezbollah fired 30+ rockets at northern Israel; Safed parking lot hit, IDF reservist seriously injured

Sources: Jerusalem Post, Middle East Eye, Reuters

2026-04-10

Hezbollah: missile strike on Ashdod naval base "in response to ceasefire violations and intense bombardment of Beirut"

Sources: TASS

2026-04-10

Lebanon will only join Israel talks if ceasefire already in place

Sources: BBC

2026-04-10

IDF: 180 Hezbollah fighters killed on Wednesday per Israeli army claims

Source: Middle East Eye

2026-04-10

14+ killed in Israeli strikes on south Lebanon

Sources: Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye

2026-04-10

Spain expelled from Gaza humanitarian centre

Sources: BBC

2026-04-10

Al Jazeera journalist Mohammed Wishah killed in Israeli strike; network condemns as "targeted assassination"

Sources: Middle East Eye, BBC

2026-04-09

Israel expands strikes on Lebanon—killing over 250 people in a single day, including the nephew of Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem.

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), TASS (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-09

Death toll rises to 300+ as Israel continues Lebanon bombing campaign despite international condemnation. WHO warns Lebanon hospitals may run out of supplies; ICRC "outraged" by civilian casualties.

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned), BBC (Western)

2026-04-09

Russia condemns strikes; Lebanon calls for direct talks with Israel.

Source: Al Jazeera (Middle East), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-09

Vance confirms Lebanon never part of US-Iran ceasefire—Israel excluded intentionally.

Sources: The Hindu (India), Al Jazeera (Middle East)
